headline: Carnival faces near-term headwinds, but long-term outlook remains intact, says Jefferies
summary: Carnival Corp (NYSE:CCL)’s reduced fiscal 2026 guidance reflects near-term pressures rather than a change in its longer-term trajectory, according to Jefferies analysts, who reiterated a ‘Buy’ rating and maintained a $35 price target on the cruise operator's shares. Shares of Carnival traded...

headline: Carnival Q2 Earnings Call Highlights Resilience Amid Europe Pause

headline: Chip Selloff Deepens as AI Doubts Bleed Into a Second Session
summary: Semis took another beating Tuesday as the AI capex narrative wobbled, the dollar punched to a one-year high, and all eyes turn to Micron earnings after the close.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Carnival, Lowers Price Target to $35
summary: Barclays  analyst Brandt Montour   maintains Carnival (NYSE:CCL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $36 to $35.
